name: Chocolate Chip Cheesecake Supreme2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate wafer crumbs and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, sugar, and flour. Mix on medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Add the eggs one at a time to the cream cheese mixture, mixing well after each addition.
4. Blend in the sour cream and vanilla extract.
5. Stir in the chocolate pieces and pour the batter over the crust.
6. Bake at 325°F for 55 minutes.
7. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan before removing it. Cool completely before serving.
8. Chill in the refrigerator. Garnish with whipped cream and fresh mint, if desired.
